zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Marshal於1200年10月9日出生在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可 卡素時，她的父親William Marshal Earl of Pembroke54歲，母親Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke28歲。她於1217年10月9日與Richard de Clare在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1239年1月16日在英國賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德享年38歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾柏利歐柏利歐 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Marshal于1200年10月9日出生在威尔士布洛可爾布洛可 卡素时，她的父亲William Marshal Earl of Pembroke54岁，母亲Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke28岁。她于1217年10月9日与Richard de Clare在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1239年1月16日在英国賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德享年38岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾柏利歐柏利歐 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Marshal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marshall  .

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Marshal was born on 9 October 1200, in Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, was 54 and her mother, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, was 28. She married Richard de Clare on 9 October 1217, in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 16 January 1239, in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Beaulieu Abbey, Beaulieu, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Marshal est née le 9 octobre 1200, à Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Clare le 9 octobre 1217, à Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1239, à Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Beaulieu Abbey, Beaulieu, Hampshire, Angleterre.

Oktober 1200 in Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Marshal Earl of Pembroke 54 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke 28. Sie hat am 9. Oktober 1217 in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Richard de Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Januar 1239 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Beaulieu Abbey, Beaulieu, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Marshal è nata il il 9 ottobre 1200 nel Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, sua padre, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Clare il 9 ottobre 1217, nel Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 16 gennaio 1239, nel Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Beaulieu Abbey, Beaulieu, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Marshalが1200年10月9日にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロク カストルで生まれた時，父William Marshal Earl of Pembrokeは54歳，母Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembrokeは28歳であった。1217年10月9日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーテウケスブリー アビーでRichard de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1239年1月16日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークハムステドで38歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアビーウリーウビーウリーウ アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Usk, Monmouth, England: 캐나다 브리티시 컬럼비아 키팀앳-스티킨 키팀앳-스티킨 시 (파르트 1) 스크
ko.Tewkesbury Abbey, Gloucestershire, , Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Marshal(이)가 1200년 10월 9일 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Marshal Earl of Pembroke(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1217년 10월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이에서 Richard de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1239년 1월 16일 영국 허트퍼드실르 버카스테드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 보리외 보리외 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.9 October 1200–16 January 1239: 9 de outubro de 1200–16 de janeiro de 1239
pt.Usk, Monmouth, England: Usk, Kitimat-Stikine C (Part 1), Kitimat-Stikine, Colômbia Britânica, Canadá
pt.St. Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales: St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.Tewkesbury Abbey, Gloucestershire, , Eng: Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Marshal nasceu em 9 de outubro de 1200, em Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Clare em 9 de outubro de 1217, em Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1239, em Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Beaulieu Abbey, Beaulieu, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Usk, Monmouth, England: уск, китимат-стикаин к (парт 1), китимат-стикаин, Британская Колумбия, Канада
ru.Tewkesbury Abbey, Gloucestershire, , Eng: тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Marshal родилась 9 октября 1200 г. в местности пемброк кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени William Marshal Earl of Pembroke было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Clare 9 октября 1217 г. в местности тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 16 января 1239 г. в местности бирхамстед, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности болиеу эбби, болиеу, хампшир, Англия.

es.9 October 1200–16 January 1239: 9 de octubre de 1200–16 de enero de 1239

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Marshal nació el 9 de octubre de 1200, en Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Richard de Clare el 9 de octubre de 1217, en Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 16 de enero de 1239, en Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Beaulieu Abbey, Beaulieu, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
